# Implementation Plan

*This file is generated by `ralph plan`. Do not edit manually.*

## Status: Feature Complete

The client-managed chunking feature specified in `specs/client-managed-chunking.md` is **fully implemented**. All acceptance criteria have been met and thoroughly tested.

### Acceptance Criteria Status

- [x] **Atomic leaves**: When `target_chunk_tokens` is `None`, `append_batch(["A", "B", "C"])` creates exactly 3 leaves
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Acceptance Criteria #1
  - Success: Verified by `test_client_managed_chunking_end_to_end` - asserts `len(leaf_nodes) == len(units)`
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_client_managed_chunking_end_to_end`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:298-316` (batch preserves all units), `ragzoom/splitter.py:144-146` (no splitting)

- [x] **No splitting**: Each leaf's text matches the input unit exactly (unless truncated)
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Acceptance Criteria #2
  - Success: Verified by `test_client_managed_chunking_end_to_end` - asserts `[node.text for node in leaf_nodes] == units`
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_client_managed_chunking_end_to_end`, `tests/test_splitter.py::test_split_text_passthrough_when_none`
  - Location: `ragzoom/splitter.py:144-146` (returns `[text]` when `target_chunk_tokens is None`)

- [x] **Dynamic targets**: Summary at height 2 targets ~1/4 the span's token count
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Acceptance Criteria #3
  - Success: Verified by `test_dynamic_targets_scale_by_height` - asserts 3.5 <= actual_compression <= 4.5 for height-2 nodes
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_dynamic_targets_scale_by_height`, `tests/test_get_summary_target.py::TestGetSummaryTarget::test_get_summary_target_dynamic_calculation`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:144-181` (`get_summary_target` function)

- [x] **Passthrough floor**: Summaries targeting < 50 tokens pass through unchanged
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Acceptance Criteria #4
  - Success: Verified by `test_passthrough_floor_integration` - nodes with target < 50 contain space-separated concatenation (no LLM call)
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_passthrough_floor_integration`, `tests/test_summary_passthrough.py::test_passthrough_when_target_is_zero`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:177-179` (returns 0 when target < 50)

- [x] **Backward compatible**: Existing configs with `target_chunk_tokens: 200` work identically
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Acceptance Criteria #5
  - Success: Verified by `test_backward_compatibility_fixed_chunking` - text is split into multiple chunks, reconstructed text matches original
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_backward_compatibility_fixed_chunking`, `tests/test_phase4_dynamic_summary_targets.py::test_summarize_pair_uses_fixed_target_when_set`
  - Location: `ragzoom/splitter.py:21-41` (uses LangChain splitter when `target_chunk_tokens` is set)

- [x] **Large unit handling**: Units > 50k chars are truncated with a warning logged
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Acceptance Criteria #6
  - Success: Verified by `test_large_unit_truncation_integration` - 60k char unit truncated to exactly 50k, warning logged
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_large_unit_truncation_integration`, `tests/test_append_executor_sqlite.py::test_append_truncates_large_units_with_warning`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:85-93` (append truncation), `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:299-312` (batch truncation)

### Edge Cases Status

- [x] **Empty string unit**: Creates leaf with empty text, embeds empty string
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Edge Cases
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_empty_string_embedding`, `tests/test_append_executor_sqlite.py::test_append_empty_string_creates_leaf_when_none`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:82-83` (allows empty text when `target_chunk_tokens is None`)

- [x] **Whitespace-only unit**: Creates leaf with whitespace, embeds it
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Edge Cases
  - Test: `tests/test_append_executor_sqlite.py::test_append_batch_preserves_empty_units_when_none` (verifies `"  "` creates leaf with preserved whitespace)
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:298-316` (preserves all units including whitespace-only)

- [x] **Unit > 50k characters**: Logs warning, truncates to 50k chars, creates leaf
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Edge Cases
  - Test: `tests/test_integration.py::TestPhase7Integration::test_large_unit_truncation_integration`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:85-93`, `ragzoom/server/append_executor.py:299-312`

- [x] **Very tall tree (height > 10)**: Dynamic target shrinks; below 50 tokens = passthrough
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Edge Cases
  - Test: `tests/test_get_summary_target.py::TestGetSummaryTarget::test_get_summary_target_large_span` (verifies height 8 with 50k chars = passthrough)
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:144-181` (formula: `span_tokens / 2^height`, floor at 50)

- [x] **First append to new document**: chars_per_token computed from that append's data
  - Spec: specs/client-managed-chunking.md § Edge Cases
  - Test: `tests/test_chars_per_token_after_append.py::test_chars_per_token_updated_after_append`
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:420-436` (`update_chars_per_token_after_append`)

### Configuration Status

- [x] **IndexConfig.target_chunk_tokens**: Type is `int | None` (supports client-managed mode)
  - Location: `ragzoom/config.py:287`

- [x] **IndexConfig.target_embedding_context_tokens**: Field exists, type `int`, default 200
  - Location: `ragzoom/config.py:288`

- [x] **default_config.json**: Contains both fields with default value 200
  - Location: `ragzoom/default_config.json:2-3`

### chars_per_token Tracking Status

- [x] **Startup initialization**: Queries all leaves, computes ratio, caches per-document
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:383-401` (`_initialize_chars_per_token_cache`)
  - Test: `tests/test_chars_per_token_startup.py`

- [x] **After-append update**: Re-queries and updates cache after each append
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:420-436` (`update_chars_per_token_after_append`)
  - Test: `tests/test_chars_per_token_after_append.py`

- [x] **Fallback value**: Returns 4.0 if no leaf data exists yet
  - Location: `ragzoom/server/indexing_engine.py:402-418` (`get_chars_per_token`)
  - Test: `tests/test_chars_per_token_fallback.py`

### Repository Methods Status

- [x] **get_avg_chars_per_token**: SQL aggregation query exists in both backends
  - Location: `ragzoom/backends/sqlite_repositories.py:1162-1180`, `ragzoom/repositories/postgres_node_repository.py:1237-1255`
